job.title: Java Full Stack Developer @ Kadel Labs (KA, IN)
job.description:
**About Kadel Labs:**

Kadel Labs is a leading IT services company delivering top-quality technology solutions since 2017, focused on enhancing business operations and productivity through tailored, scalable, and future-ready solutions. With deep domain expertise and a commitment to innovation, we help businesses stay ahead of technological trends.

As a CMMI Level 3 and ISO 27001:2022 certified company, we ensure best-in-class process maturity and information security, enabling organizations to achieve their digital transformation goals with confidence and efficiency.

**Job Title: Senior Software Engineer -Java Full Stack**

**Location: Bangalore**

**Experience: 3+ Years**

**Job Description:​**

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer with 3–5 years of hands-on experience to join our core engineering team. You will work across the backend (Java / Spring Boot) and frontend (React) layers of a large-scale, production platform. You will contribute to new feature development, client onboarding, PostgreSQL migration, and platform hardening initiatives.This is a high-ownership role — you will be responsible for features end-to-end, from API design and database schema changes (via Liquibase) through to UI integration and deployment.

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Design and develop REST APIs using Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x for core business domains: payments, settlement, allocation, legal, and digital communications.

- Build and maintain React 18 UI components with Redux Toolkit for state management and Material-UI v5 for design.

- Write and maintain Liquibase changesets for schema evolution across Oracle and PostgreSQL databases.

- Ensure dual-engine compatibility (Oracle + PostgreSQL) for all backend SQL and Hibernate mappings.

- Integrate with internal services via RabbitMQ messaging and REST-based Feign clients.

- Work with AWS services: S3 (document storage), Lambda (rule engine triggers), SQS/SNS (async notifications), EKS (deployment).

- Implement and consume OAuth2/OIDC flows via Keycloak integration.

- Participate in code reviews, write unit and integration tests, and maintain code quality standards.

- Collaborate with mobile, infra, and product teams in an agile environment.

**Requirements**

- 3–5 years of professional software development experience

- At least 2 years in Java + Spring Boot backend development

- At least 1 year of production React frontend work

**Backend:**

- Java 17 — strong proficiency; streams, concurrency, generics

- Spring Boot 3.x — REST controllers, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security

- Hibernate 6.x — entity mappings, JPQL, native queries

- Liquibase — versioned schema migrations, multi-DB changesets

- Oracle SQL + PostgreSQL — comfortable writing and optimising queries on both

- REST API design — pagination, error handling, idempotency

**Frontend:**

- React 18 — functional components, hooks, context

- Redux Toolkit — slices, thunks, RTK Query

- Material-UI v5 — theming, custom components

- REST API integration — Axios/fetch, error boundaries, loading states

- Basic understanding of build tooling (Webpack / Vite / npm)

**General:**

- Git — branching, PR-based workflow, rebasing

- Docker — building and running containers locally

- Understanding of microservice architecture

- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines

**PREFERRED / NICE-TO-HAVE**

- Experience with AWS (S3, SQS, Lambda, EKS / Kubernetes)

- Keycloak or any OAuth2/OIDC provider integration

- RabbitMQ or any message broker (Kafka, ActiveMQ)

- Flowable BPMN or any workflow engine

- Redis (caching, session management)

- API Gateway patterns

- FinTech or NBFC domain knowledge (loans, collections, settlements)

**Benefits**

Why Join Kadel Labs?

· Opportunity to work with a fast-growing, innovative company.

· A dynamic work environment where creativity and new ideas are encouraged.

· Competitive salary and benefits package.

· Professional development opportunities in a people-first culture.

**Visit us:**

https://kadellabs.com/

https://in.linkedin.com/company/kadel-labs

https://www.glassdoor.co.in/Overview/Working-at-Kadel-Labs-EI\_IE4991279.11,21.html

Job Type: Full-time

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Application Question(s):

* What is the duration of Notice period to be served?
* What is your current and expected CTC?

Experience:

* React 18: 2 years (Required)
* Java+Springboot: 3 years (Required)

Location:

* Bengaluru, Karnataka (Required)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Full Stack Development Trainer @ Maharana Pratap Group Of Institution (UP, IN)
job.description:
The Full Stack Development Trainer will be responsible for delivering practical, industry-oriented training to undergraduate and postgraduate students in Full Stack Development. The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in frontend and backend development, database integration, APIs, version control, and deployment. The role involves designing and delivering engaging training sessions, developing course materials, mentoring students, evaluating their progress, and preparing them for industry requirements through hands-on learning and real-world projects.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Deliver interactive and hands-on training sessions in Full Stack Development.
* Teach frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and modern frontend frameworks/libraries relevant to the assigned technology stack.
* Train students in backend development using the assigned programming language and framework.
* Teach database design, SQL, database integration, and CRUD operations.
* Train students in RESTful APIs, authentication, and application integration.
* Conduct practical coding sessions, lab exercises, assignments, and real-world projects.
* Develop course content, training materials, assessments, and coding challenges aligned with current industry standards.
* Evaluate student performance through assignments, quizzes, coding assessments, and project reviews, and provide constructive feedback.
* Mentor students in project development, coding best practices, debugging techniques, and technical interview preparation.
* Conduct workshops, coding bootcamps, hackathons, and technical seminars.
* Stay updated with the latest technologies, frameworks, and industry trends to continuously enhance the training curriculum.
* Collaborate with academic and placement teams to improve student employability and placement readiness.

**Required Qualifications**

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* Strong expertise in Full Stack Development.
* Proficiency in frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and modern frontend frameworks/libraries.
* Strong knowledge of backend development using at least one technology stack such as Java, Python, Node.js, .NET, PHP, or a similar framework.
* Good understanding of relational and/or NoSQL databases, SQL, database design, and optimization.
* Experience with REST APIs, Git/GitHub, and application deployment.
* Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts effectively.
* Passion for teaching, mentoring, and helping students develop industry-ready skills.

**Preferred Experience**

* Minimum 2 years of experience as a Technical Trainer, Software Developer, or Faculty in Full Stack Development.
* Experience in delivering classroom or online technical training.
* Experience in mentoring students for live projects, internships, coding competitions, and placement preparation.
* Knowledge of cloud platforms, CI/CD, Docker, or DevOps tools will be an added advantage.
* Relevant certifications in Full Stack Development or associated technologies will be preferred.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹50,000.00 - ₹100,000.00 per month

Benefits:

* Paid sick time

Work Location: In person

job.title: Full Stack Developer (AI & Data Visualization Focus) @ The Nielsen Company (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Company Description**

At Nielsen, we are passionate about our work to power a better media future for all people by providing powerful insights that drive client decisions and deliver extraordinary results. Our talented, global workforce is dedicated to capturing audience engagement with content - wherever and whenever it’s consumed. Together, we are proudly rooted in our deep legacy as we stand at the forefront of the media revolution. When you join Nielsen, you will join a dynamic team committed to excellence, perseverance, and the ambition to make an impact together. We champion you, because when you succeed, we do too. We enable your best to power our future

 **Job Description**

End-to-End Development: Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using Python (Django/Flask/FastAPI) and modern front-end frameworks (e.g., React, Vue, or Angular).

System Architecture: Build and optimize RESTful APIs and microservices to connect data layers with user-facing applications.

Data Integration: Develop and manage workflows/pipelines to extract data from cloud tables (SQL, Spark) and integrate them into application features.

AI Implementation: Leverage AI techniques and advanced prompting to build "intelligent" features, such as automated summaries, predictive text, or smart search within applications.

Data Visualization: Integrate Tableau dashboards or custom JavaScript libraries (D3.js, Chart.js) into applications to provide interactive, "always-on" insights.

Database Management: Design and maintain efficient database schemas and handle ETL processes necessary for application performance.

Innovation: Stay abreast of emerging full-stack, visualization, and AI tools, continuously optimizing the software development life cycle (SDLC).

Collaboration: Support ad-hoc requests and translate technical architecture into layman’s terms for business stakeholders.

 **Qualifications**  

* Education: Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical field.
* Experience: 2+ years of experience in Full Stack development, with strong expertise in Python, SQL, and JavaScript
* Back-end Expertise: Proficiency in Node.js or Python-based frameworks, and experience with PySpark for large-scale data processing.
* Front-end Expertise: Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript frameworks for building responsive user interfaces.
* AI Mastery: Deep understanding of AI prompting techniques and experience integrating LLMs or machine learning models into production software.
* Cloud & Data: Hands-on experience with AWS or GCP and a solid understanding of data warehousing and ETL concepts.
* Visualization: Extensive knowledge of Tableau and the ability to embed complex visualizations into custom web environments.
* Soft Skills: Excellent communication skills, strategic thinking, and the ability to work independently or collaboratively to solve complex product problems.

**We Offer**

* A challenging work environment with opportunities for continuous growth in AI and Software Engineering.
* The chance to build the tools that power the world's leading media measurement company.

 **Additional Information**

Please be aware that job-seekers may be at risk of targeting by scammers seeking personal data or money. Nielsen recruiters will only contact you through official job boards, LinkedIn, or email with a nielsen.com domain. Be cautious of any outreach claiming to be from Nielsen via other messaging platforms or personal email addresses. Always verify that email communications come from an @nielsen.com address. If you're unsure about the authenticity of a job offer or communication, please contact Nielsen directly through our official website or verified social media channels.

job.title: loT Developer @ ENX SYSTEMS PTE LTD (TN, IN)
job.description:
**Job Description**

IoT Developer

Job Summary

We are looking for a talented IoT Developer with strong expertise in designing, developing, and supporting Internet of Things (IoT) platforms for connected devices and intelligent infrastructure.

The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience with IoT ecosystems, industrial communication protocols, embedded technologies, and real-time data processing. In this role, you will design and implement scalable IoT solutions using Java/JDK, the Equinox OSGi framework, BACnet and Modbus protocols, Bluetooth technologies, and data visualization tools.

You will play a key role in delivering reliable IoT platforms that enable device connectivity, real-time analytics, automation, and data-driven insights across industrial and commercial environments.

**Key Responsibilities**

IoT Platform Development & Architecture

* Design, develop, and support scalable IoT applications using Java/JDK and Equinox OSGi.
* Develop modular and flexible applications using OSGi plugin-based architecture.
* Design edge processing solutions for local device-level computing.
* Implement device management solutions for monitoring, configuration, and firmware updates.
* Design APIs and backend components for device communication and remote connectivity.

**Connectivity & Industrial Protocols**

* Develop BACnet integrations using the Serotonin BACnet library.
* Implement Modbus RTU/TCP communication using the j2mod framework.
* Integrate Bluetooth (BLE and Classic) functionality using the BlueZ stack.
* Ensure secure and reliable communication between edge devices and cloud platforms.
* Manage protocol conversion and data standardization across multiple systems.
* Implement communication recovery, reconnection, and fault-tolerant mechanisms.

**Database & Storage Management**

* Develop and maintain embedded database solutions using HSQLDB.
* Optimize database storage, indexing, and query performance for time-series data.
* Design database schemas for sensor data, device metadata, and system logs.
* Implement backup, archival, and data retention strategies.
* Ensure database integrity and disaster recovery readiness.

**Data Processing & Visualization**

* Design and implement real-time IoT data processing pipelines.
* Develop dashboards and reports using amCharts or similar visualization tools.
* Perform data transformation, filtering, and aggregation.
* Build monitoring dashboards for device health and operational performance.
* Configure alerts for anomalies and threshold violations.

**Automation & System Integration**

* Develop automation scripts and integration tools using Python.
* Design workflows for automated device provisioning and configuration.
* Develop reporting and data export utilities.
* Perform scheduled maintenance and system updates.
* Integrate IoT platforms with enterprise applications and third-party systems.

**Deployment & Infrastructure Integration**

* Integrate IoT solutions with HVAC, BMS, and industrial automation systems.
* Work with sensors, gateways, controllers, and actuators for smart automation projects.
* Install and configure IoT gateways and edge devices.
* Troubleshoot networking and communication issues.
* Implement secure device onboarding and authentication.

**Development Process & Tools**

* Use Jira and Atlassian tools for project tracking and team collaboration.
* Manage project builds and dependencies using Apache Maven.
* Maintain source code using Git and Bitbucket.
* Participate in Agile development activities and sprint planning.
* Develop applications using IDEs such as Eclipse or IntelliJ IDEA.

**Code Quality & Performance**

* Develop clean, efficient, and maintainable code.
* Improve system scalability, memory usage, and application performance.
* Design optimized algorithms for embedded and resource-constrained environments.
* Monitor application throughput, latency, and system stability.
* Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards.

**Testing & Debugging**

* Perform unit testing and integration testing for IoT applications.
* Troubleshoot protocol, connectivity, and data-related issues.
* Conduct field testing and on-site validation when required.
* Resolve system performance and stability issues.
* Develop diagnostic, logging, and monitoring capabilities.

**Collaboration & Technical Documentation**

* Collaborate with hardware engineers, software developers, analysts, and stakeholders.
* Prepare and maintain API, architecture, and technical documentation.
* Develop deployment guides, user manuals, and troubleshooting documentation.
* Share technical knowledge and support team members.
* Present technical solutions and project updates to internal and external stakeholders.

Requirements

**Core IoT Expertise**

* Strong knowledge of Java (JDK 8+) and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
* Hands-on experience with Equinox OSGi.
* Good understanding of modular application architecture and OSGi lifecycle management.
* Experience with embedded systems and edge computing.

**Industrial Communication Protocols**

* Experience with BACnet and the Serotonin BACnet library.
* Good understanding of Modbus RTU/TCP using j2mod.
* Familiarity with the BlueZ Bluetooth stack (BLE & Classic).
* Knowledge of industrial communication protocols.

Database & Storage

* Experience with HSQLDB or other embedded databases.
* Strong SQL and database optimization skills.
* Understanding of time-series databases.
* Knowledge of IoT data storage architecture.

**Data Visualization**

* Experience with amCharts or similar visualization frameworks.
* Understanding of UI/UX principles for monitoring dashboards.

**Automation & Scripting**

* Strong Python scripting skills.
* Familiarity with pyserial, pymodbus, and pybluez.
* Experience with Bash scripting.

**Development Tools**

* Experience using Jira, Confluence, and Atlassian products.
* Familiarity with Apache Maven.
* Strong experience with Git and Bitbucket.
* Understanding of CI/CD practices.
* Experience with JUnit and Mockito testing frameworks.

**Soft Skills**

* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Good communication and teamwork abilities.
* Detail-oriented with a focus on quality and reliability.
* Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.
* Adaptable to changing technologies and project requirements.
* Passion for IoT technologies and continuous learning.

**Education & Experience**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
* 3–5 years of experience in IoT or embedded application development.
* Proven experience in developing enterprise-level IoT solutions.
* Experience in industrial automation or smart building solutions will be an advantage.

**Preferred Skills**

* Specialization in IoT or Embedded Systems.
* Experience working with IoT sensors and smart devices.
* Knowledge of MQTT, CoAP, AMQP, OPC UA, Zigbee, and Z-Wave.
* Experience with Raspberry Pi or Arduino platforms.
* Familiarity with edge and fog computing.
* Understanding of IoT cybersecurity and encryption standards.
* Experience with Docker.
* Exposure to Edge AI or Machine Learning applications.
* Knowledge of LoRaWAN, LTE-M, or other wireless communication technologies.

Location: Chennai

Work Location: In person

job.title: SAP BTP ABAP CONSULTANT @ Meithee Tech (TS, IN)
job.description:
What's this role about?

As an SAP BTP ABAP consultant, your primary role would be to get to the heart of customer issues, diagnose problem areas, design innovative solutions and facilitate deployment resulting in client delight. You will work as a full stack developer for development of state-of-the-art software applications in SAP S/4HANA cloud and On Premise.

Here's how you'll contribute:

In this role, you will demonstrate responsibility for all SAP ABAP development tasks and ensure completion of custom developments with good quality, on time delivery and efficiency. You will

* Apply clean code principles: execute code reviews, code inspections, unit testing, performance measurements and other quality tasks.
* Perform development tasks in a self-reliant way.
* Work closely with Architect, Senior Developers and other stakeholders to achieve effective design and code reviews.
* Author software design and technical documentation.

**Skills required to contribute:**

* Experience in Supporting SAP Extensibility Explorer through SAP Business Technology Platform
* Experience in Supporting SAP ABAP development tasks with customizations to CDS views, Fioriapps, support and maintain O data services and API services
* Requires minimum 5 to 10 years of experience in developing, deploying and configuring applications on Cloud Foundry using SAP CAPM.
* Experience creating and configuring launch pad sites using BTP portal service/Launchpad Service/Work Zone.
* Knowledge of BTP services like workflow management, Hana cloud, XSUAA, Document Service etc & configuring destinations to cloud and on-premise systems and using them in applications.
* Knowledge about platform operations like Identity Provider configuration, assertion-based mapping for authorization, role collection configuration etc.
* Experience consuming OAuth protected REST APIs in applications.
* Knowledge of Java or Node JS programming language.
* Experience in SAP Cloud Platform, SAP UI5 and SAP Fiori is required.
* Should have excellent technical skills in Reports, Forms, Interfaces, Conversions, Enhancements etc.
* Experience on skills ODATA, IDOC & Proxies, Workflow, HANA checks/HANA Migration etc.
* Should be well versed with Object Oriented (OO) concepts of SAP ABAP.
* Excellent knowledge of ABAP Debugging, SAP Code inspector & other SAP standard tools with respect to development
* The candidate should be certified in SAP ABAP.
* The candidate must have hands on SAP ABAP programming experience for at least 5 to 8 years.
* The candidate must have hands on experience in custom object development using SAP ABAP on HANA.
* Should have hands on experience in Integrations with third party applications & non-SAP systems.
* The candidate should have working experience in UI5, Fiori, Workflow, ADOBE / smart forms.
* The candidate must have experience in preparation of Technical specifications.
* Should have good communication skills.

**Additional skills required**

* Basics of Architecture and Design fundamentals
* Knowledge of agile methodologies and understanding of Project life cycle activities on development and maintenance projects
* Basics of business domain to understand the business requirements
* Analytical abilities, strong technical skills and good communication skills
* Good understanding of the technology, domain and Awareness of latest technologies and trends
* Ability to demonstrate a sound understanding of software quality assurance principles, SOLID design principles and modelling methods
* Excellent problem solving, analytical and debugging skills

**Qualifications:**

* Bachelor of Engineering / MCA or any equivalent qualification.
* SAP Certification in ABAP Programming

Apply link:https://meitheetech.com/career-view.php?id=108115

Pay: ₹2,000,000.00 - ₹2,500,000.00 per year

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Hyderabad, Telangana

job.title: Senior Software Developer - (Agentic AI, LLM, Python, Django, FastAPI) @ Icogz Pvt Ltd (MH, IN)
job.description:
At **icogz Technologies** Pvt Ltd, we are pioneers in harnessing the power of generative AI and proprietary algorithms to transform the complexity of Big Data into clear, actionable insights. Our unique approach recognizes the challenges posed by fragmented data silos, which stem from the diverse perspectives of various stakeholders within a company.

By utilizing our advanced proprietary algorithms and streamlined data processing flows, we effectively integrate and analyze vast, disparate datasets. This process delivers a unified, cohesive view of your business operations, enabling real-time analysis and insightful decision-making.

Our solutions at icogz Technologies empower businesses to swiftly adapt and capitalize on strategic opportunities. By turning big data into a navigable landscape of insights, we help enhance operational agility, improve performance, and drive profitability.

**Role Overview:**  
We are seeking a visionary **Senior Software Developer**- Technology to lead our cross-functional development team. This is a strategic role for a leader who is passionate about building end-to-end solutions. You will guide a talented team of both backend and frontend developers, overseeing the entire technical stack—from our high-performance Python backend (Django/FastAPI) and big data pipelines to our sophisticated frontend interfaces built with React and advanced data visualization libraries (amCharts, D3.js).

Your primary responsibility will be to ensure the seamless delivery of cohesive, scalable, and data-rich applications. You will bridge the gap between complex backend data processing and intuitive, performant user experiences, fostering a culture of technical excellence, collaboration, and innovation.

**Key Responsibilities:**

**Holistic Technical Leadership & Strategy:**

* Lead, mentor, and manage a cross-functional team of backend (Python) and frontend (React) developers, fostering their professional growth.
* Drive the overall technical roadmap and architectural vision for our products, ensuring end-to-end consistency, scalability, and security.
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, UX Designers, and Data Scientists to translate business and user needs into a unified technical strategy.
* Ensure seamless integration and alignment between backend APIs and frontend data consumption, optimizing the entire data-to-visualization workflow.

**Backend & Data Excellence:**

* Oversee the design, development, and maintenance of our Python backend, including RESTful APIs (Django/DRF, FastAPI) for big data and LLM applications.
* Guide the team in optimizing PostgreSQL and Document DBs (e.g., MongoDB) for performance, security, and scalability in a multi-tenant SaaS environment.
* Ensure the robustness and efficiency of our data processing pipelines using tools like Pandas, PySpark, and Dask.

**Frontend & Visualization Excellence:**

* Guide the frontend team in building scalable, modular, and performant applications using React/TypeScript and state management libraries (Redux, Context API).
* Oversee the development of interactive, data-rich dashboards using visualization libraries like amCharts and D3.js to handle complex datasets effectively.
* Champion best practices for frontend performance, including rendering optimization for large datasets, lazy loading, and efficient data handling.

**Execution & Operational Excellence:**

* Lead a rigorous code review process across the entire stack (both frontend and backend) to ensure high code quality, maintainability, and adherence to best practices.
* Own the end-to-end software development lifecycle, including establishing and refining CI/CD pipelines, automated testing (e.g., Jest, Cypress, Pytest), and deployment strategies.
* Drive a culture of quality by working with QA teams to validate data accuracy and integrity from the database all the way to the final user-facing visualization.
* Take ownership of the long-term health of the codebase, manage technical debt, and lead incident response and root cause analysis for production issues.

**Requirements:**

* **8+** years of professional software development experience, with a strong foundation in **backend systems.**
* **3+** years of experience in a **technical leadership role, managing and mentoring a team of developers.**
* Expert-level proficiency in **Python, Django, and FastAPI.**
* Strong, demonstrable understanding of modern frontend architecture, particularly with React/TypeScript and state management.
* Proven experience leading a full-stack or cross-functional team, with a track record of delivering complex, data-intensive applications.
* Deep expertise in PostgreSQL and Document DBs (e.g., MongoDB), including performance tuning and schema design.
* Experience defining and managing CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and collaboration skills, with the ability to align technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* A strong product-oriented mindset, focused on delivering user value.

**Nice-to-Have**:

* Hands-on experience with or a strong appreciation for data visualization libraries like**amCharts or D3.js.**
* Familiarity with cloud platforms **(AWS, Azure)** and containerization **(Docker, Kubernetes).**
* Experience with WebSocket-based real-time applications.
* Knowledge of testing frameworks like **Jest or Cypress.**
* Familiarity with monitoring tools like **Grafana, Prometheus.**
* Exposure to analytical databases **(ClickHouse, DuckDB) or AI/ML model deployment.**

Why Join Us?

* Lead the end-to-end technical strategy for cutting-edge generative AI products.
* Mentor and grow a talented, cross-functional team of engineers.
* Bridge the gap between big data, AI, and intuitive user-centric design.
* Drive innovation in a collaborative culture with a high degree of autonomy and impact.
* Significant leadership opportunities.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

* Are you based out of Mumbai?
* How many years of experience with LlamaIndex ? ( Required Minimum 2 years)

Experience:

* Python: 6 years (Required)
* (Django/ FastAPI): 5 years (Required)
* Leadership: 3 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Software Engineer - Frontend Full Stack @ Rippling (KA, IN)
job.description:
**About Rippling**
------------------

Rippling gives businesses one place to run HR, IT, and Finance. It brings together all of the workforce systems that are normally scattered across a company, like payroll, expenses, benefits, and computers. For the first time ever, you can manage and automate every part of the employee lifecycle in a single system.

Take onboarding, for example. With Rippling, you can hire a new employee anywhere in the world and set up their payroll, corporate card, computer, benefits, and even third-party apps like Slack and Microsoft 365—all within 90 seconds.

Based in San Francisco, CA, Rippling has raised $1.85B+ from the world’s top investors—including Kleiner Perkins, Founders Fund, Sequoia, Greenoaks, and Bedrock—and was named one of America's best startup employers by Forbes.

We prioritize candidate safety. Please be aware that all official communication will only be sent from @Rippling.com addresses.

**About the HRIS Product Team at Rippling**
-------------------------------------------

Rippling is rapidly expanding its customer base, supporting larger enterprise customers, and launching new lines of business across its 20+ products, all while scaling globally. At the hear of this ecosystem is Employee Records, a foundational element that powers not only HR products but also integrates seamlessly with every product to deliver a unified, cohesive experience.

The HRIS (Human Resources Information Systems) team plays a critical role in managing all aspects of employee data, including hiring, onboarding, offboarding, and transitions. The team's mission is to ensure the correctness and completeness of employee records, which serve as the backbone of Rippling’s ecosystem.

HRIS operates at the forefront of Rippling’s growth, building new products at high velocity to support expansion into new verticals and customer segments while maintaining the integrity of data. As the entry point for any new customer or product integration, the HRIS team is pivotal to delivering Rippling’s vision of a unified platform for modern workforce management.

**HRIS Product Verticals**
--------------------------

* HRIS Flows Experience: Focused on creating simple, intuitive workflows that empower Rippling's customers to manage employee data seamlessly.
* HRIS Flows Infrastructure: Provides the scalable backbone for all flow products, prioritizing reliability, data integrity, and performance at scale.
* HRIS Country Expansion and Configurability: Focused on HRIS’s expansion and growth to multiple countries across the globe and enable companies to configure their flows.Dedicated to expanding and developing Human Resource Information Systems (HRIS) globally, facilitating customizable workflow configurations for businesses worldwide.
* HR Applications: Develops essential tools and interfaces for customers to view, manage, and interact with employee data effectively.
* Org Management: Enables the creation and maintenance of company structures tailored to organizations of all sizes and complexities.

**What you will do**

* Join the HRIS Country Org Management team, where you'll tackle fascinating challenges related to sustainable growth in diverse international markets.
* Create innovative products from the ground up and experience exponential scaling, from 0->1 launch to widespread adoption.
* Translate high-level business requirements into a software design; communicate the designs to the other developers in the team.
* Review and share feedback on code, features, technology, architecture, and designs. Drive the standards around code quality and testing across your product.
* Provide mentorship junior engineers on your team to help them grow in their technical responsibilities and remove blockers to their autonomy
* Have exposure to business and technical leadership to strategize what can improve our revenue and our ability to scale rapidly

**What you will need**
----------------------

* Minimum 6+ years of programming experience on frontend engineering.
* Ability to exercise discretion and independent judgment in the performance of the duties
* Ideally experience in scaling products 0->1 and 1->100
* Experience in technology stack : Python, Django, React, MongoDB, AWS
* Ability to thrive in an ambiguous environment by identifying areas of impact and independently pursuing them
* Infectious passion for solving real customer pain points
* Experience in building scalable distributed systems

job.title: Intern - WordPress Developer @ Icogz Pvt Ltd (MH, IN)
job.description:
**About Us**

icogz is a technology company focused on building innovative digital solutions that help businesses improve operations, streamline processes, and make informed decisions. We work on modern web platforms, enterprise applications, and digital experiences that support business growth and transformation.

**Role Overview**

We are looking for a creative and technically versatile **Junior WordPress Full Stack Developer** to join our team on a **3-month contractual basis**, with a clear pathway to full-time employment based on performance and business requirements.

This role spans both frontend implementation and backend WordPress development, including theme and plugin customization, database interaction, third-party integrations, and website performance optimization. The ideal candidate is comfortable working across the WordPress ecosystem, has a strong eye for design, and can deliver high-quality solutions in a fast-paced environment.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Frontend Development**

* Design and develop responsive, visually appealing WordPress websites aligned with brand guidelines.
* Convert wireframes, design mockups, and creative briefs into functional web pages.
* Customize WordPress themes and work with page builders such as Elementor or Gutenberg to build and refine layouts.
* Ensure websites are optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with consistent cross-browser performance.
* Implement modern UI/UX best practices to enhance user experience and engagement.

**Backend Development**

* Develop and customize WordPress themes and plugins using PHP and WordPress coding standards.
* Work with MySQL databases, including managing custom post types, taxonomies, and custom fields.
* Integrate third-party services such as payment gateways, CRM platforms, marketing tools, and external APIs.
* Implement and manage WordPress hooks (actions and filters) to extend functionality.
* Support user role management, permissions, and content workflows as required.

**Performance, Security & Maintenance**

* Optimize websites for speed, usability, and overall performance through caching, image optimization, and efficient coding practices.
* Apply WordPress security best practices, including regular updates, plugin maintenance, and website monitoring.
* Use Git for version control and collaborative development workflows.
* Troubleshoot and resolve frontend issues, backend errors, and plugin conflicts efficiently.
* Assist with website deployment, testing, and maintenance activities.

**Collaboration & Development Workflows**

* Collaborate with marketing, content, and design teams to deliver projects on time and within scope.
* Communicate project progress, blockers, and timelines clearly with stakeholders
* Contribute ideas to improve development processes, code quality, and project outcomes.
* Stay updated with emerging WordPress technologies and industry best practices.

**Required Skills**

* Solid understanding of WordPress CMS, including themes, plugins, custom post types, hooks, and the WordPress Loop.
* Proficiency in PHP and WordPress theme/plugin customization.
* Strong command of HTML5, CSS3, responsive web design, Flexbox, and CSS Grid.
* Working knowledge of JavaScript and jQuery for frontend interactivity.
* Familiarity with MySQL and WordPress database structures.
* Hands-on experience with Elementor, Gutenberg, or a similar page builder.
* Basic understanding of REST API integration and third-party services.
* Familiarity with Git and GitHub for version control.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to writing clean, maintainable code.
* Good problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.

**Preferred Skills**

* Experience building custom WordPress themes beyond page builder-based implementations.
* Familiarity with WooCommerce, including product management and template customization.
* Experience working with Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) or similar tools.
* Basic understanding of website deployment workflows and staging environments.
* Familiarity with design tools such as Figma or Adobe XD.
* Awareness of SEO best practices and commonly used WordPress SEO tools.
* Portfolio demonstrating WordPress projects involving both frontend and backend development.
* Self-motivated, eager to learn, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree, diploma, or certification in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Web Development, or a related field.
* 0–2 years of experience in WordPress development or a related role.
* Freshers and recent graduates are encouraged to apply if they have a strong portfolio and hands-on project experience.
* Equivalent self-taught experience, certifications, or bootcamp training will also be considered.

**Employment Details**

* **Employment Type: Contract (3 Months)**
* **Potential Full-Time Conversion: Based on performance and business requirements**
* Work Mode: On-site
* Location: Mumbai, India

**What We Offer**

* Opportunity to work on diverse and challenging web development projects.
* Hands-on learning and mentorship from experienced professionals.
* Exposure to modern WordPress development practices and tools.
* Collaborative and fast-paced work environment.
* Potential conversion to a full-time role based on performance and business needs.

**How to Apply**

Please share your resume, portfolio, and links to WordPress websites or landing pages you have designed or developed.

**Email:** hr@icogz.com

Work Location: In person

job.title: Team Lead – Hyper Automation (RPA, AI, ML) @ Bosch (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Company Description**

**Bosch Global Software Technologies Private Limited** is a 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH, one of the world's leading global supplier of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT and Business Solutions. With over 27,000+ associates, it’s the largest software development center of Bosch, outside Germany, indicating that it is the Technology Powerhouse of Bosch in India with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe and the Asia Pacific region.

 **Job Description**

**Role Overview**

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Team Lead – Hyper Automation (RPA) & AI/ML to guide our automation engineering team. In this role, you will lead the transition of our team into a highly efficient, service-based unit that offers end-to-end (E2E) development and delivery of automation and AI/ML-powered applications.

As a technical and people leader, you will bridge the gap between business strategy and technical execution, designing complex RPA workflows, integrating cutting-edge AI/ML models (including Gen AI), and mentoring a team of developers to deliver scalable, secure, and high-impact business solutions.

**Roles & Responsibilities :**  
  
**1. Technical Leadership & E2E Service Delivery**

* Drive E2E Service Delivery: Lead the team in analyzing complex business processes and executing end-to-end development, testing, deployment, and maintenance of automation services.
* Architecture & Design: Oversee the solution design of advanced RPA workflows using Automation Anywhere (A360) and Power Automate, ensuring they are secure, scalable, and resilient.
* AI/ML & Gen AI Integration: Direct the integration of AI/ML algorithms, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Gen AI capabilities (such as chatbots and document automation) into traditional RPA workflows.
* Technical Governance: Establish and enforce development best practices, reusable code repositories, frameworks, and coding standards.

**2. Team Management & Mentorship**

* People Leadership: Lead, coach, and mentor senior and junior developers, fostering a culture of continuous learning, technical excellence, and proactive problem-solving.
* Resource Allocation: Manage sprint planning, resource assignment, and workload balancing across multiple concurrent automation projects.
* Performance Management: Conduct performance evaluations, identify skill gaps, and coordinate training programs to upskill the team on emerging automation tech.

**3. Stakeholder Management & Collaboration**

* Business Partnering: Collaborate with cross-functional teams, business analysts, process owners, and leadership to understand business pain points and translate them into technical automation pipelines.
* Escalation Support: Act as the senior point of escalation for complex technical issues, providing advanced troubleshooting and ensuring minimal disruption to deployed bots.
* Agile Orchestration: Lead daily standups, sprint planning, and retrospective sessions in an Agile environment to ensure predictable project delivery.

 **Qualifications**

**Educational qualification:**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).

**Experience :**

* **Overall Experience**: Minimum 7+ years of experience in software engineering/IT.
* **RPA & Automation Experience**: At least 5+ years of hands-on experience in RPA and AI/ML development.

**Leadership Experience**: Minimum 2 years of experience in a technical lead, team lead, or scrum master role managing technical delivery teams.

**Mandatory/requires Skills :**  
  
**Technical Stack & Skills**

* **Must Have**:

  + RPA Platforms: Automation Anywhere (Automation 360), Power Automate (Desktop & Cloud Flows).
  + Programming: Python (for AI/ML integrations, scripting, and custom components).
  + AI/ML Concepts: Document Automation/IQ Bot, NLP, Computer Vision, API Integrations, SQL Queries.
  + Methodology: Agile / Scrum.
* **Good to Have**:

  + Low-Code/No-Code: Experience with low-code platforms (e.g., Power Apps) is a major plus.
  + Advanced AI: Experience with Deep Learning, Generative AI APIs, and LLM orchestration.
  + Programming: C# / .NET, JavaScript.

**Mandatory Certifications:**

* Automation Anywhere Certified Advanced or Master RPA Professional (A360).
* Power Automate PL-500 certification.

**Personal Attributes**

* **Strategic Thinking**: Ability to align technical automation projects with high-level business goals and service-delivery transitions.
* **Excellent Communication**: Strong verbal and written communication skills to present technical solutions clearly to non-technical business partners.
* **Quality-Driven**: Exceptional attention to detail with a focus on delivering high-quality, auditable, and compliant software.
* **Adaptable & Proactive**: Confident in navigating fast-paced environments and eager to champion new technologies within the organization.

 **Additional Information**

**Educational qualification:**

* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).

**Experience:**

* Minimum 7 years of hands-on experience in RPA development with **Automation Anywhere (A360), Power Platform and AI/ML**.

job.title: Full Stack Developer (TN, IN)
job.description:
**Job Description –**

**Full-Stack Engineer Developer**

**Experience:** 3–5 Years

**Employment Type**: Full-Time

**Job Summary**

We are looking for a talented **Full-Stack Developer** to build, deploy, and maintain scalable data-driven applications from end to end. In this role, you will work across data ingestion, backend API development, frontend development, cloud deployment, and production monitoring. You will own the complete development lifecycle—from ingesting data and transforming it into meaningful insights to delivering responsive user interfaces and ensuring reliable production operations on AWS.

**Key ResponsibilitiesData Engineering & Processing**

* Build and maintain scalable data ingestion pipelines from APIs, files, and operational systems.
* Develop robust ETL/ELT workflows including validation, deduplication, enrichment, reconciliation, and idempotent processing.
* Design efficient data models for PostgreSQL/MySQL and MongoDB.
* Optimize SQL queries, database indexing, and data storage strategies.
* Orchestrate workflows using Apache Airflow (or equivalent) with scheduling, retries, dependencies, monitoring, and backfills.

**Backend Development (Node.js / TypeScript)**

* Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using **Node.js** (TypeScript preferred).
* Build and maintain RESTful APIs (GraphQL experience is a plus).
* Implement authentication, authorization, pagination, filtering, rate limiting, and API security.
* Develop background jobs, worker processes, queues, and scheduled tasks.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code with robust logging and error handling.
* Troubleshoot production issues through debugging, profiling, and root cause analysis.

**Frontend Development (React)**

* Develop responsive, user-friendly web applications using **React**.
* Build data-intensive UI components such as:
* Data tables
* Search and filters
* Forms
* Upload/Download functionality
* Dashboard views
* Status tracking
* Audit trails
* Integrate frontend applications with backend APIs while ensuring excellent user experience and error handling.

**AWS, DevOps & Deployment**

* Deploy and manage applications on AWS.
* Work with AWS services including:
* EC2
* ECS/EKS
* Lambda
* S3
* IAM
* RDS
* CloudWatch
* Containerize applications using Docker.
* Support CI/CD pipeline implementation and deployment automation.
